title: Aramb
content:
{{Top|fca|leg|notoc=1}} {{Character |type=GFFA |image= |name=Aramb |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]]''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]]''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|And Lieutenant Aramb?''"
"''Paralyzed and unable to speak, sir. Apparently, the Killik venom isn't as effective against Gotals.|Nek Bwua'tu and Yuul during the Battle of the Murgo Choke|}} '''Aramb''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] in the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]]. In [[36 ABY]], he was stationed on the [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory I''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Admiral Ackbar (Victory-class)|''Admiral Ackbar'']] as part of its [[Engineer/Legends|engineering]] staff, and had been there for several [[Standard year/Legends|years]]. When the insectoid [[Killik/Legends|Killiks]] expanded into [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss space]], violating the [[Qoribu Truce]], the [[Fifth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Fifth Fleet]] [[Blockade of the Utegetu Nebula|blockaded]] the [[Utegetu Nebula/Legends|Utegetu Nebula]] at the [[Murgo Choke]]. The Killiks, under the influence of the [[Gorog]] nest, [[Battle of the Murgo Choke|attacked]] the Fifth Fleet at the Murgo Choke. Aramb was attacked by Gorog [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]] trying to infiltrate and capture the ''Admiral Ackbar''; the assassins paralyzed Aramb with their [[Poison/Legends|venom]]. Two other members of the ''Admiral Ackbar''{{'s}} engineering staff, [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Urbok]] and [[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|Lieutenant Commander]] [[Reo]], were [[Death/Legends|killed]] by the Gorog venom, leaving [[Ensign/Legends|Ensign]] [[Yuul]], the only member of the engineering staff who was conscious, to assume command of the engineering section of the [[Starship/Legends|starship]]. Yuul theorized that the Gorog venom was not lethal to Gotals. The battle ultimately culminated in the capture of the ''Admiral Ackbar''. The [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]], believing the Galactic Alliance had allied with the Killiks, declared war on the Killiks, starting the [[Swarm War]]. ==Behind the scenes== Aramb was first mentioned in the [[2005]] novel ''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]'', written by [[Troy Denning]]. He later received a minor entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', published in [[2008]]. ==Appearances== *''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]'' {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Aramb }} [[Category:Engineers]] [[Category:Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet officers]] [[Category:Gotals]] [[Category:Males]]
